meaning: n.(根据权利提出)要求,要求权,主张,要求而得到的东西vt.(根据权利)要求,认领,声称,主张,需要
examples: Critics claim the trucks are unsafe.
She is still pressing her claim for compensation.
That the claim was then hotly disputed only gave the programme a further boost.
Some experiments claim to have seen signals of dark matter in the form of annual modulation.
